name: Garlic Croutons
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and cook, stirring frequently, for 2 minutes, until golden.
3. Remove the garlic and discard it.
4. Add the bread cubes and toss to coat with oil.
5. Cook, stirring frequently, for another 4 minutes, until golden.
6. Remove from heat and let cool completely before serving.
Per serving: Calories 108 Fat 4g No cholesterol Sodium 159mg Percent calories from fat 34%
